alkylation reagent: 50 µL 10 mM TCEP and 40 mM chloroacetamide
alkylation concentration: 50 µL 10 mM TCEP and 40 mM chloroacetamide
cleavage agent: 0.2 µg Promega sequencing grade modified trypsin
collision energy: 1.4 m/z isolation window, 27 NCE, 30 s dynamic exclusion
enrichment method: were enriched for further analysis by affinity purification
instrument: MS performed on a Q-Exactive HF-X mass spectrometer
reduction reagent: 2 mM DTT to elute biotinylated proteins
reduction concentration: 2 mM DTT to elute biotinylated proteins
